Game starts up but I can only see a black screen, tried with GEProton and the recommended proton from steam and it didn't work
Flawless just by changing proton version

I played this game since launched date Apr 2024, and they still didn't "fix" annoying black screen verification box at the 1st time loading game.
Game launcher is always okay. Then when you Start game from their client, they welcome you with black screen. If your DE let you moving Wine windows, it's full black layer cover laoding game screen. There is trick here. If you're running Proton-GE like me, scout your cursor around middle screen. This box ask you to tick to accept ToS, whatever BS. Tick it, and under this tick is Okay button. Yes, you need to grope this 2 bottons and game will continue loading okay. Idk if anyone get lucky without this annoying "feature" at the 1st loading time. After that, game can be launching normally. Landscape mode is still beta after 2 years of service. You better pick fullscreen or vertical mobile mode. Nothing more to complain, but really other Chinese gacha made better Linux compatible client than this sh**. I can list from my playing exp: Limbus, HSR, Wuwa, Endfield.

gpu: AMD Radeon RX 6800 XT (radeonsi, navi21, ACO, DRM 3.64, 6.17.7-ba29.fc43.x86_64)
notes: It's practically the same experience, just with a small added steps

This is for everyone having trouble with the initial blackscreen. That screen only appears if no account is logged in. By linking an existing account with steam on another device (I used my phone for that), this screen is skipped and the installation starts immediately. After that the game runs smooth and without further issues (at least so far and with Proton 11 Beta).

I launch the game from Steam and it doesn’t work no matter what I try: Proton Experimental, Hotfix, GE-Proton 10, or Proton 11 (beta). The game starts, I can hear the music from the loading screen, but after a few moments the screen turns black or white, depending on which Proton version I selected and nothing happens after that. Most likely, the "EasyAntiCheat" system is blocking the connection on Linux and doesn’t allow the game to run.
